description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. Play up this classic style with a summery dress or sharply cut formals. The textured bag is perfect for weekdays and holiday escapades! Made of textured leatherette with a metallic brand badge on the front and contrast stitch detailing Two leatherette shoulder handles Two main roomy compartments with a mobile pouch in the first compartment and a zippered pocket in the second One zippered pocket at the back Metal ring, rivet and mock toggle detailing on the upper Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
